title: SmoothBreak
description: Switch tools, break smooth. Bring back the old days.
body:
# SmoothBreak 
![Break blocks while switching tools with SmoothBreak](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcm9kbTk5cXc2ZnVmZW8xajNmam9qYzRmODFpbWw1MzlkMG5kazh4cyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/vkw9jRakN0uTCguhcd/giphy.gif)

SmoothBreak restores the block-breaking behavior from Minecraft 1.7, where switching tools mid-mining did **not** reset block break progress.

In modern versions, when you're mining a block with one tool and switch to another, the progress resets. This mod prevents that — allowing you to **scroll between pickaxes** (or similar tools) without any loss of progress.

## Will it be updated to newer versions or loaders?

If many users ask for them, I'll update it for sure!
Just contact me through my website:
https://javivi.dev

## Consider donating ☕
